q: A man is angry ______ a person; he may be angry ______ a thing.
Our villagers voted ______ the Congress candidate.
It is needless to lament ______ the dead.
The dead body is devoid ______ sense.
The old man is totally dependent ______ his son.
I exchanged my pen ______ his watch.
His mother is anxious ______ his future.
We are accountable ______ God for our actions.
His father is anxious ______ his performance in the exams.
We met ______ chance in the market.
His views are in accordance ______ mine.
